zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，关注关键支撑
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD报64.79，24小时上涨1.09%，显示短线存在一定买盘支撑。但价格仍低于20日均线66.03，表明中期趋势尚未完全转强，市场整体处于震荡偏弱格局，反弹动能仍有待进一步确认。

从技术指标来看，MACD值为-0.432，仍位于零轴下方，反映空头力量尚未完全消退。不过价格接近日内高点65.10，说明短线资金情绪有所改善。由于RSI数据缺失，当前需更多依赖均线和价格结构判断市场方向。

关键支撑位可关注64.00附近，该区域与日内低点64.04形成共振，若跌破则可能下探63.00一线。上方首个阻力位位于65.10，进一步阻力关注20日均线66.00附近，若有效突破将提升市场看涨预期。

交易策略方面，激进投资者可在64.00至64.20区域观察企稳信号后尝试低吸，目标看向66.00附近；稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新站稳20日均线后再考虑顺势做多。若跌破64.00支撑，应严格控制风险并警惕进一步回调。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 64.79, recovering modestly with a 1.09% gain over the last 24 hours. Despite the intraday strength, the broader short-term trend remains cautious as price continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 66.03. This suggests that sellers still maintain a degree of control, and bullish momentum has not yet fully reasserted itself. The narrow trading range between 64.04 and 65.10 indicates a market that is consolidating rather than trending aggressively.

Technical indicators present a mixed picture. The MACD value of -0.432 indicates that bearish momentum remains present, although the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation of momentum shifts. Price trading below the SMA(20) reinforces the view that the prevailing short-term bias is slightly negative. The unavailable RSI reading prevents assessment of overbought or oversold conditions, making price action and moving-average positioning the primary tools for evaluating current market strength.

Key support appears near the session low around 64.00, with additional downside interest likely emerging in the 63.00–63.50 zone if selling pressure increases. On the upside, immediate resistance is located around 65.10, followed by the more significant barrier at the SMA(20) near 66.03. A sustained move above 66.00 would improve the technical outlook and potentially attract momentum buyers, while a break below 64.00 could trigger further weakness toward lower support levels.

From a trading perspective, conservative traders may prefer to wait for confirmation of a breakout above 66.00 before establishing new long positions. More aggressive participants could consider buying near support levels with disciplined risk management and stop-loss placement below recent lows. Short-term bearish opportunities may emerge if price fails repeatedly at resistance and loses the 64.00 support area. Overall, the market currently favors a neutral-to-slightly-bearish stance until stronger bullish confirmation develops.
